description_long: This is a large, rectangular freestanding cabinet with a light gray, wood-textured finish. The front features a symmetrical arrangement of vertical handles, with two central doors and two additional doors on either side, above a series of horizontal drawers. The handles are slim and dark, providing a stark contrast to the pale surface. The cabinet stands on four small, black feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or openings, emphasizing its clean, modern design. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, with metal hardware for the handles and drawer mechanisms.
description: A large, light gray wood-textured cabinet with multiple doors and drawers, featuring dark vertical handles and a modern, clean design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cabinet's four doors, eight drawers, and all visible handles, highlighting its symmetrical and functional design.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the cabinet's depth and plain, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: The back view displays a featureless, flat surface with the same light gray finish as the rest of the cabinet.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the cabinet's depth and plain side panel.
